transcript.text:
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
Will you be able to eat all of this?
Just a simple fix
Where do I start?
[Convenience store food]
[Convenience store, not a buffet]
[This is a first]
[Where to now?]
[Is that pizza?]
[Eating more?]
[What is this all for?]
[What exactly is she up to?]
Hello everyone
I'll be renting a car today to eat some food
And to drive around to buy stuff
There's a program called "T-Membership" through SK Telecom

You get to save money & earn points by using it to rent the car
I'll try to rent this car through my phone right now
[Enter information]
[Log in]
[Enter the number under the barcode to finish registering]
It's 119,900 Won to rent for 1 day (Hyundai Avante)
You can get 55% off through T-Membership
So the total is 53,960 Won
55% for weekdays, 50% for weekends
You receive 55% because it's a weekday
That's a huge discount
So I get the discount and also earn points?
Yes, you earn 5% of the spendings towards points
I'll assist in doing a final check-up on the car before I let you off
[After a thorough inspection]
[She's ready to go!]

There's a place I need to stop by before I go eat
[What's more important than food right now?]
I came to a bakery to buy some stuff and I'll head off to eat
[Tous les jour]
There it is in big lettering
It's called T-Day
I can get discounts here too
Chocolate
That's pretty
[That's... a lot?]
[Delicious seasonal pastries]
[This]
[And that]
[Now for some cakes]
It's T-Day for Tous Les Jour
which means SK Telecom customers can receive either a 30% discount or stack points

I'll get points this time
You can choose discounts or rewards from here
In order to receive the discount,
Click the T-Day icon
Scroll down
Click this for the barcode
This is for discounts or rewards
I see that you're a Space Pass member
You are able to get an additional 10%, so it will be 40% total
Thank you
[Tous Les Jour T-Day Space Pass] [40% off or points up to 30,000 Won]
You now have 12,000 points in your membership
We were told that you're buying these to do good deeds
And we would love to also take part in it during this hard time
[From Tous Les Jour's owner]
Thank you

Sir,
I will deliver with love
-Continue doing good work -Thank you
[Car full of gifts]
[Now it's time to eat!]
[All of that...?]
[Another basket?]
Dark meat chicken skewer, please
-Do you have the T-Membership card? -Yes I do
You can get either 10% discount or 10% points
I have it
-Can you eat all of this? -Yes I can
71,850 Won, please
Points, please
I keep on stacking points like this through purchases
I think this is great 10% is actually a lot

-Can I eat this here? -Yes you can
I came for a quick meal
Where do I start? Drinks first
So thirsty
[Plum juice of course]
[Fueling...]
This is Samyang Ramyun rice, not noodles Cool, right?
It's noodles and rice
It's like when you mix rice in your leftover ramyun soup
Chicken skewer
I've never had these here at CU
This is exactly what I like
Soft and moist
Snack corners would have these microwave ones
[Now for the cup noodles (Yukgaejang]
The smell of it

Undercooked is the best
Hot..
We're nearing towards the end of the year,
And I also haven't been able to visit the orphanage too much because of Covid
I will be visiting today with bread and gifts
I also have braised kimchi here
[Is this really braised kimchi from a convenience store?!]
[WIth some rice]
Really nice and soft
Really tasty
Too good to be here at a convenience store
The meat is so tender too Breaks right off
So good
How's this convenience store food? Even glass noodles in here
These have improved so much It's really delicious
Kimchi on top of dumplings

This is the stir-fried Shin Ramyun cup
It's really unique
Tastes like the seasoning
with some black pepper
Ham tuna mayo? This one's excellent too
This is not regular mayonnaise It's so good
You're so good at eating
First time seeing something like this in 55 years
Convenience store food isn't easy to eat
Shocking
Caprisun
It's been so long I used to drink these all the time
Oh no
Cheese Franks
I love the cheese bits
After using the T-Membership today,

I think it's really convenient that you get to choose either discounts or rewards
I will save a lot of points so I can buy something nice later
Jjapaghetti cup
Perfectly cooked
These look pretty small in portion
But it's not
It's filled all the way
I remember this taste
I've never seen anyone eat like that
I want her to be my teacher/instructor
Boiled eggs for spicy noodles
So yummy
I was planning on buying pizza for the kids at the orphanage
And there's not much time left so I have to get moving
I'll eat these on the way there
[3rd stop: Pizza Hut]

Hello~!
I ordered 25 pies over the phone
-Do you guys accept T-Membership for savings? -Yes
I have a lot of points saved up now
You can use this just like cash
How nice
[945,000 Won total for the pizzas] [She was able to save 60,000 Points] [30% into discounts/points up to 20,000 Won]
We will donate the beverages
Thank you All of that?!
[Thank you Pizza Hut]
[Load everything in the car]
[Will we go see the kids now?]
[A toy store?]
[Let's pick out some toys for the kids]
[I hope they like the gifts]
[We're gonna need another cart]

[After buying gifts for the kids]
[Let's go see them now]
[Evergreen Orphanage located in Gwanak-gu]
Hello!
Good to see you again
It's cold! Hello
[Move it move it]
[We can't go in too far]
We're not able to see the kids because of covid
So all I can do is deliver for today
Sucks, I really wanted to see them
Kids, I will be back again with more goodies
Let's see each other very soon
Have a good Christmas and New Years
Be healthy, fighting!
Thank you

[Thank you SKT for the sponsorship]
Bring in the letters
They wrote letters and drew pictures for you
Amazing...
Really?
I'm so touched
Amazing Thank you very much
I love it
Some of the kids that she helped out since preschool now graduated
Now they are in elementary (1st, 2nd, 3rd graders)
Ah, it's Sanghyun!
[Handwritten poster made with their little hands]
[She received many of them]
[She then stayed in the car for a while to watch them from far away]
Sister Tzuyang, always take care of your health And be careful not to catch Covid
Merry Christmas, Happy New Year

Thank you for getting us presents every year
Merry Christmas, Happy New Year
Sister Tzuyang, let's hang out together when Covid is over I love you!
I love you
Thank you Tzuyang
I love you Tzuyang
Merry Christmas Tzuyang
[Making memories with Tzuyang and SKT's gifts]
[Keep growing, have a warm holiday with great memories]
[Good health comes first!] [I will always be here cheering for you!]
This is the last stop I'm making today
I came to use the points for some drinks
I want to buy drinks for all the SKT staff members that helped me out today
by using the points here at Gongcha
Click pay,
T-Membership

Scan the barcode
135,900 Won total
I just made a purchase solely using reward points
I got to eat a lot of good food today
And also got to do some nice things with SKT
Very worthwhile
T-Membership was way more useful than I thought
With lots of benefits
I like the effectiveness of it
Also an option to save points
I want to thank everyone for a great year
Happy holidays I will work hard in 2022
Thank you!
[2021, a year filled with happy memories]
[All thanks to the restaurant owners that welcomed me] [And also the love from my subscribers]
[I was able to spend a happy year]

[I wish everyone nothing but happy events in the year 2022]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Yi Moon Dream Regional Children's Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
